creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
I just ran into this nasty bug last night as well.  The patch in

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=148238

fixes OSPF for me on RELENG_8. Without it, ospfd does not see any neighbours.
Any chance of committing the patch to the ports tree ?

         ---Mike
